accounted_constraints.name: service_time_windows
accounted_constraints.details: Visit start times are constrained by site day/time windows in OR-Tools.

accounted_constraints.name: travel_time_between_points
accounted_constraints.details: Travel time is calculated from geocoded coordinates using Haversine distance and average speed.

accounted_constraints.name: service_duration
accounted_constraints.details: Each visit consumes its declared service duration in the time dimension.

accounted_constraints.name: technician_capabilities_and_skills
accounted_constraints.details: Eligibility filters apply skill hierarchy plus physical/heights/lift/pesticide/citizen flags.

accounted_constraints.name: preferred_and_avoided_technicians
accounted_constraints.details: Preferred technicians are currently treated as a hard allow-list; avoided technicians are hard exclusions.

accounted_constraints.name: permit_restrictions
accounted_constraints.details: If a site requires a permit, only technicians listed in the permit column remain eligible.

accounted_constraints.name: max_daily_work_time
accounted_constraints.details: Route duration per day is bounded by technician shift and max hours per day.

accounted_constraints.name: multi_tech_same_time_visit
accounted_constraints.details: Sites requiring multiple technicians are duplicated into a synchronized group with equal start time and different vehicles.

not_accounted_constraints.name: weekly_work_limit
not_accounted_constraints.details: Maximum hours per week are parsed but not enforced across the whole week.

not_accounted_constraints.name: break_window
not_accounted_constraints.details: Break duration and allowed break window are parsed but no break interval is inserted into the solver.

not_accounted_constraints.name: home_start_finish_modes
not_accounted_constraints.details: Current builder routes technicians from office to office; home/either works is not yet modeled.

not_accounted_constraints.name: non_consecutive_repeat_visit_rule
not_accounted_constraints.details: Weekly frequency patterns spread some visits across the week, but there is no generic hard rule forbidding day-by-day assignments.

not_accounted_constraints.name: hub_and_walk_multimodality
not_accounted_constraints.details: Drive-to-hub and walk chains are not modeled in the current solver.

not_accounted_constraints.name: multi_week_cycle_2_3_4_week_recurrence
not_accounted_constraints.details: The MVP optimizes one work week; long recurring cycle generation is not implemented.
